content.text: colyseus найти на гитхаб документацию последней версии библиотеки

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to find the documentation for the latest version of a Colyseus library on GitHub. Let me search for the Colyseus repository and then look at its documentation.

Colyseus is a websockets-based multiplayer game server framework. I should search for it on GitHub first.
